enterprise.config_auto_approve_blog_desc: Publish new blog posts immediately instead of holding them for moderator review.
enterprise.config_auto_approve_listings_desc: Publish new listings immediately instead of holding them for moderator review.
enterprise.config_contact_email_desc: Address members use to reach support.
enterprise.config_contact_phone_desc: Public phone number for support enquiries.
enterprise.config_currency_name_desc: Display name for the time-bank currency.
enterprise.config_currency_symbol_desc: Short symbol shown next to balances.
enterprise.config_digest_frequency_desc: How often the activity digest email is sent.
enterprise.config_email_notifications_enabled_desc: Default for new accounts. Members can override in their own settings.
enterprise.config_footer_text_desc: Charity number, company registration, or other legal text displayed in the footer.
enterprise.config_group_content_desc: Approval rules and content filters for listings and posts.
enterprise.config_group_general_desc: Site identity, localization, and footer text.
enterprise.config_group_notifications_desc: Default delivery channels for new accounts and digest cadence.
enterprise.config_group_registration_desc: Who can sign up, what they verify, and how they are welcomed.
enterprise.config_group_wallet_desc: Time-credit balance, transfer caps, and how the currency is named.
enterprise.config_locale_desc: Language used for new members until they pick their own.
enterprise.config_maintenance_mode_desc: Read-only. Toggle via scripts/maintenance.sh on the server.
enterprise.config_max_file_upload_mb_desc: Per-file upload size limit. Larger files are rejected at the server.
enterprise.config_max_groups_per_user_desc: Most groups a single member can join. Set to 0 for no limit.
enterprise.config_max_listing_images_desc: Upper limit on photos attached to a single listing.
enterprise.config_max_listings_per_user_desc: Most listings a single member can have active at once. Set to 0 for no limit.
enterprise.config_max_transaction_desc: Largest single transfer between members. Set to 0 for no limit.
enterprise.config_onboarding_enabled_desc: Walk new members through profile and skills setup after sign-up.
enterprise.config_profanity_filter_desc: Block submissions containing words on the platform's profanity list.
enterprise.config_push_notifications_enabled_desc: Default for new accounts. Members can override in their own settings.
enterprise.config_registration_enabled_desc: Turn off to close sign-ups entirely.
enterprise.config_require_approval_desc: New accounts must be approved by an admin before they can sign in.
enterprise.config_require_email_verification_desc: Members must verify their email address before accessing the platform.
enterprise.config_site_description_desc: Short tagline used in metadata and shared links.
enterprise.config_site_name_desc: Public name shown in the header, browser tab, and emails.
enterprise.config_starting_balance_desc: Time credits granted to new members on sign-up. Set to 0 to disable.
enterprise.config_timezone_desc: IANA timezone identifier used for scheduling and timestamps.
enterprise.config_welcome_message_desc: Shown to new members on their first sign-in.
enterprise.create_role_desc: Define a new custom role with specific permissions
enterprise.delete_document_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete this document? This cannot be undone.
enterprise.delete_role_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete this role? This cannot be undone.
enterprise.desc_send_to_everyone_may_be_redundant: Sending to everyone may be redundant if members are already subscribed
enterprise.edit_role_desc: Update the name, description, and permissions for this role
enterprise.enterprise_dashboard_desc: Overview of GDPR compliance, system health, roles, and configuration
enterprise.error_logs_desc: View and manage system error logs
enterprise.failed_to_load_g_d_p_r_audit_log: Failed to load GDPR audit log
enterprise.failed_to_load_settings_desc: We could not reach the configuration service. Check your connection and try again.
enterprise.fix_errors_before_saving: Fix the highlighted errors before saving.
enterprise.gdpr_audit_log_desc: Audit trail of all GDPR-related actions taken on this platform
enterprise.gdpr_breaches_desc: Record and manage data breach reports in accordance with GDPR
enterprise.gdpr_consents_desc: View member consent records for all legal documents
enterprise.gdpr_dashboard_desc: GDPR compliance overview including requests, consents, and breaches
enterprise.gdpr_requests_desc: View and manage GDPR data requests (access, deletion, portability)
enterprise.health_check_desc: Run system health checks to verify database, Redis, and services
enterprise.legal_doc_list_desc: Manage legal documents including Terms, Privacy Policy, and Cookie Policy
enterprise.link_data_breaches_desc: View and manage reported data breaches
enterprise.link_data_requests_desc: View and manage GDPR data requests
enterprise.permission_browser_desc: Browse all available permissions in the system
enterprise.related_admin_pages_desc: Configuration that lives on its own dedicated page.
enterprise.related_broker_controls_desc: Exchange workflow, messaging review, and risk tagging.
enterprise.related_federation_desc: Inbound partnerships, auto-approval, shared categories, and partnership limits.
enterprise.related_image_settings_desc: Default formats, sizes, and WebP conversion behaviour.
enterprise.related_module_configuration_desc: Toggle features on/off and tune how each module behaves.
enterprise.related_onboarding_settings_desc: Welcome steps, required profile fields, and skills setup for new members.
enterprise.related_operations_desc: Cache stats and background job controls.
enterprise.related_registration_policy_desc: Granular sign-up rules, invite codes, allowlisted domains, and captcha.
enterprise.related_safeguarding_options_desc: Reporting flows, escalation paths, and safeguarding policies.
enterprise.related_translation_settings_desc: Default language and the languages members can choose from.
enterprise.role_list_desc: View and manage custom roles for this tenant

national_admin.name: KISS National Foundation Admin
national_admin.description: Cross-program oversight, reporting standards, federation visibility, and network governance.

canton_admin.name: KISS Canton Admin
canton_admin.description: Regional operations, municipal coordination, reporting, and trusted-partner oversight.

municipality_admin.name: KISS Municipality Admin
municipality_admin.description: Local participation, help requests, organisations, and public-sector reporting.

cooperative_coordinator.name: KISS Cooperative Coordinator
cooperative_coordinator.description: Member onboarding, matching, hour review, and sensitive-support escalation.

organisation_coordinator.name: KISS Organisation Coordinator
organisation_coordinator.description: Opportunity management, volunteer rosters, logged hours, and partner activity.

trusted_reviewer.name: KISS Trusted Volunteer Reviewer
trusted_reviewer.description: Limited review authority for approved hour logs and community trust signals.

enterprise.reset_configuration_cleared: Will be cleared: registration mode, email verification, admin approval, footer text, default locale, timezone, welcome message, wallet, content, notifications, and limits settings.
enterprise.reset_configuration_intro: This restores all platform configuration to its default values.
enterprise.reset_configuration_preserved: Will be preserved: site name, description, contact details, default currency, and maintenance mode (CLI-managed).
enterprise.settings_not_loaded: Settings have not loaded yet. Reload before saving.
enterprise.secrets_vault_desc: Manage stored secrets and API credentials
enterprise.system_config_desc: View and manage system configuration keys
enterprise.system_monitoring_desc: Monitor system health, uptime, and performance metrics
enterprise.validation_email: Enter a valid email address (e.g., name@example.com)
enterprise.validation_url: Enter a valid URL that starts with http:// or https://

version_form.create_info: Create a draft version before publishing it to members.
version_form.draft_description: Keep this version unpublished until it is ready for review.
version_form.edit_info: Update this draft before publishing it as the current version.

enterprise.clear_log_confirm: Clear this log file? This removes the current contents and cannot be undone.
enterprise.export_filter_description: Exports use the optional date range above.
enterprise.gdpr_breach_description_placeholder: Describe what happened, the likely impact, and immediate containment steps...
enterprise.gdpr_breach_detail_desc: Review breach impact, response analysis, DPA notification status, and remediation actions.
enterprise.gdpr_consent_types_desc: Manage the consent types members can grant or deny.
enterprise.gdpr_create_request_desc: Create an admin-initiated data protection request for a member.
enterprise.gdpr_delete_consent_type_confirm: Delete this consent type? This cannot be undone.
enterprise.gdpr_dpa_72h_requirement: GDPR requires supervisory authority notification within 72 hours when a breach is likely to risk member rights.
enterprise.gdpr_no_users_for_consent_type: No users for this consent type
enterprise.gdpr_no_users_found_for: No users found for this search
enterprise.gdpr_request_detail_desc: Review request status, SLA progress, assignment, notes, and available actions.
enterprise.legal_versions_desc: Review draft and published versions, compare changes, and notify members when legal terms change.
enterprise.notify_modal_intro: Choose who should receive an update about this published legal version.
enterprise.pending_users_count: {{count}} members still need to accept this version
enterprise.publish_version_confirm: Publish this draft as the current legal version?
enterprise.track_compliance_description: Track member acceptance coverage across current legal document versions.
enterprise.gdpr_type_access_desc: Provide the member with a copy of their personal data.
enterprise.gdpr_type_erasure_desc: Delete personal data where there is no lawful reason to retain it.
enterprise.gdpr_type_objection_desc: Record and assess an objection to processing.
enterprise.gdpr_type_portability_desc: Provide personal data in a portable, machine-readable format.
enterprise.gdpr_type_rectification_desc: Correct inaccurate or incomplete personal data.
enterprise.gdpr_type_restriction_desc: Restrict processing while the request is assessed.
enterprise.empty_docs_title: Set up your community’s legal documents
enterprise.empty_docs_desc: Add your terms & conditions, privacy policy, and cookie policy so members can read and accept them.

enterprise.pending_users_count_other: {{count}} members still need to accept this version

legal_doc_form.create_description: Create a tenant legal document and prepare its first managed version.
legal_doc_form.edit_description: Update the document metadata, content, status, and version label.
legal_doc_form.settings_description: Manage this document’s title and how members are asked to accept it. The document text is managed under Versions.
legal_doc_form.type_locked_hint: The document type cannot be changed after creation.
legal_doc_form.requires_acceptance_desc: Members must actively accept this document.
legal_doc_form.notify_on_update_desc: Let you notify members when a new version is published.
legal_doc_form.is_active_desc: Inactive documents are hidden from members.
legal_doc_form.created_next_step_toast: Document created — now add its first version.

legal_versions.editor_description_edit: Edit this draft version before publishing.
legal_versions.version_not_found: That version could not be found.
legal_versions.only_drafts_editable: Only draft versions can be edited. Published versions are locked.
